reviews.comment:
Es una estación fantasma. Fui de noche y es tétrica. De película de terror.. literal

(Translated by Google)
It's a ghost station. I went at night, and it's eerie. Literally like a horror movie.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPZ3NXNzFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Todo bien

(Translated by Google)
All good
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyNDg2MWJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Tiene lugar para relajarse al aire libre.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. It has a place to relax outdoors.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyM3I2TXJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente estación de servicio. Baños impecables.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service station. Spotless restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyN3NTcHB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Paramos siempre en viajes largos. Tiene mucho espacio al aire libre y juegos para que los chicos descarguen en viajes largos.

(Translated by Google)
We always stop there on long trips. It has plenty of outdoor space and games for the kids to run around on long journeys.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyOXVEZ3ZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy amable el personal, pero escaso
Un solo playero, hay que esperar mucho para que te atiendan en el surtidor

(Translated by Google)
Very friendly staff, but few staff.
Only one beach attendant, so you have to wait a long time to get served at the pump.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyM0pEaU1REAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Ideal para salir un rato de la autopista, tomar algo al aire libre y estirar las piernas

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Ideal for getting off the highway for a while, having a drink outdoors and stretching your legs.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyb1k3S2JBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, está cerca de la autopista y hay mucha menos gente cargando que en la siguiente Ypf

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, it's close to the highway and there are far fewer people filling up than at the next YPF station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyd1p2QVFBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención

(Translated by Google)
Very good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMybU52MkRREAE

reviews.comment:
Pasé, los baños muy limpios, la atención del personal excelente. Lugar acogedor para hacer un alto en el camino

(Translated by Google)
I stopped by; the restrooms were very clean, and the staff was excellent. A cozy place to stop along the way.
